diff:
diff --git a/src/users.py b/src/users.py
index c7b30ef..36be7c4 100644
--- a/src/users.py
+++ b/src/users.py
@@ -4,7 +4,8 @@ USERNAME_RE = re.compile(r"^[a-z0-9_]{3,20}$")
 
 
 def normalize_username(username: str) -> str:
-    candidate = username.strip().lower()
+    # Normalize to lowercase without stripping whitespace to preserve validation
+    candidate = username.lower()
     if not USERNAME_RE.fullmatch(candidate):
         raise ValueError("invalid username")
     return candidate
